brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has tightened its grip as the Fear & Greed Index sinks to 33, yet beneath the surface, stablecoin growth and a deeply reset MVRV Z-Score are painting a familiar picture of stealth accumulation. This setup echoes the August 2024 bottom, where extreme anxiety preceded a sharp mean reversion as sidelined capital was deployed. The market feels broken, but the foundation is quietly being laid for those willing to look past the noise.
brain_consensus.headline: Silent Accumulators Stalk the Fearful Crowd

next_move.reasoning: Track record shows 0% direction accuracy with repeated false UP/DOWN calls resolving to HOLD; extreme ETF flows and VIX spike suggest institutional hedging not retail capitulation, while funding at 52 and btc_dom_fade at 50 show alt rotation not bottom accumulation, keeping us stuck in Anxiety chop despite the August 2024 bottom analog.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 with stablecoin_growth rising above 55 and funding collapsing below 30
next_move.invalidated_if: etf_flows sustain above 90 for 2+ weeks with btc_momentum_30d breaking above 65 and vix dropping below 45
